# CMProjectionType.equirectangular

**Case**

Video content displays as a 360 degree equirectangular projection.

## Declaration

```swift
case equirectangular
```

## Discussion

The video frames map onto the interior of a 3D sphere projection.

## Projection Surfaces

- **CMProjectionType.rectangular**: Video content displays on a flat, rectangular 2D surface.
- **CMProjectionType.halfEquirectangular**: Video content displays as a 180 degree equirectangular projection.
- **CMProjectionType.fisheye**: Video content displays as a fisheye projection.
